{"step_by_step_thinking": "The query asks whether the Mcm2-Ctf4-Polα axis plays a role in the transfer of histones to leading strand DNA at replication forks. However, there is no mention of the Mcm2-Ctf4-Polα complex or its role in histone transfer to the leading strand. The UMLS documents are entirely unrelated to molecular mechanisms of DNA replication or histone transfer.
